ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

URL: https://github.com/Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts
Language: javascript
All parts of Claude Code's system prompt, 27 builtin tool descriptions, sub agent prompts (Plan/Explore/Task), utility prompts (CLAUDE.md, compact, statusline, magic docs, WebFetch, Bash cmd, security review, agent creation). Updated for each Claude Code version.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
Language: javascript
CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: addyosmani/agent-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills
Language: javascript
Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
Language: javascript
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Official remote MCP server for Atlassian. Securely connect Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code, and other AI tools using OAuth 2.1 or API tokens.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: byoungd/up
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/byoungd/up
Language: javascript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
